fields.description: URL-safe identifier (e.g. "humanoids", "bipedal-humanoids"). Used as the doc name. Lowercase, digits, and hyphens only.
fields.label: Slug

fields.description: Persian display label shown to fa users (e.g. "انسان‌نماها").
fields.label: Label (fa)

fields.description: English display label shown to en users (e.g. "Humanoids").
fields.label: Label (en)

fields.description: Optional parent. Top-level categories leave this blank; subcategories Link to their parent (depth 1 only per Phase 1 validation).
fields.label: Parent Category

fields.description: Sort order within siblings (lower = first). Defaults to 0.
fields.label: Display Order

fields.description: Uncheck to hide from the public catalog. Internal admins can still see it in Desk.
fields.label: Is Published

fields.description: Optional emoji or icon hint (e.g. "🤖" for humanoids). Frontend may use this when no image is set.
fields.label: Icon

fields.description: Reference to the matching ERPNext Item Group. Auto-set by the Phase 3.5 sync command (iranrobot_backend.commands.sync_to_erpnext.run).
fields.label: ERPNext Item Group
